Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response.FunctionResponse

  • Packages that use FunctionResponse 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
    Provides domain classes representing objects of the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response
    Provides classes representing responses from the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.

    • Uses of FunctionResponse in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain that return FunctionResponse 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      FunctionResponse Part.getFunctionResponse()
      The result output of a FunctionCall that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name and a structured JSON object containing any output from the function is used as context to the model.
      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain with parameters of type FunctionResponse 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Part.setFunctionResponse​(FunctionResponse functionResponse)
      The result output of a FunctionCall that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name and a structured JSON object containing any output from the function is used as context to the model.
      Part.PartBuilder Part.PartBuilder.withFunctionResponse​(FunctionResponse functionResponse)
      The result output of a FunctionCall that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name and a structured JSON object containing any output from the function is used as context to the model.

      Constructor Description
